form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 5th of 9 at Ascot Grad Hcp 60+ on February 28 over 1000m, 2.5 len behind Pingers with 57kg at $12. Second run from a spell 9th of 12 at Ascot 0Mwly on March 14 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Urquharts Bluff with 57kg at $12. Easier here and he looks the one to beat.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of seven months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 11 at Carnarvon Rtg 56+ August 31 over 1600m, 6 len behind Kings Sicario carrying 60kg at $9. First up last campaign third in a small field at Port Hedland Cl3 May 10 over 1300m, 2 len behind Chavorio carrying 58kg at $7. Win would surprise.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up came from midfield and won by 1.0 len at this track March 2 over 1200m defeating Pretty Devine with 55kg at $7. Second run from a spell eased back early on 3rd in a small field at this track on March 15 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Marines Cry with 56.5kg at $5.50. Can bounce back to winning ways third-up.
